Rationale for This Stack: Weak CI stacks need explicit repository structure and approval controls for custom logic.
Less Suitable / Likely Blocked: Avoid unmanaged local scripts as part of deployment.

Best Approach 3: Separate governance path for dbt deployments
Rationale for This Stack: For legacy or non-dbt stacks, dbt should be an optional side-path with separate governance.
Less Suitable / Likely Blocked: Avoid forcing dbt Cloud into stacks that are not ready for it.

Best Approach 2: Compatibility layer for old/new template outputs
Rationale for This Stack: Lower-maturity stacks need backward compatibility because pipeline logic is usually more brittle.
Less Suitable / Likely Blocked: Avoid breaking current custom scripts without a transition layer.
